node.statement: SUBROUTINE 2A — Sparse Matrix Block Encoding: Given an NxN sparse matrix A with at most s nonzero entries per row/column, construct an (alpha, O(log N), 0)-block encoding using row oracle O_r, column oracle O_c, and entry oracle O_A (GSLW19 Lemma 47-48). For this paper: s=27 (27-point stencil in 3D FEM), alpha=O(1). Applied to A/h^3 (Lemma 21), D tensor I_3 (Lemma 23), and C^(p)/h^3 (Lemma 22). Gate cost: O(z poly(log 1/h, log 1/delta)) per oracle call.
